# wellplayed_iam_member (Resource)

Manages an organization (IAM) membership: assigns an account to a permission group and grants member-specific permissions. Backed by the `setOrganizationMembership` and `deleteOrganizationMembership` mutations.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Add a member by account ID and assign them a permission group.
resource "wellplayed_iam_member" "by_id" {
  user_id  = "acc_01h..."
  group_id = "grp_admins"
}

# Add a member by email, with an extra scoped permission on top of the group.
resource "wellplayed_iam_member" "by_email" {
  email    = "teammate@example.com"
  group_id = "grp_editors"

  permissions {
    id        = "tournament:write"
    resources = ["tournament_123", "tournament_456"]
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `email` (String) Email address of the user to add. Mutually exclusive with `user_id`; exactly one must be set. Changing it forces a new membership.
- `group_id` (String) ID of the permission group assigned to this member.
- `permissions` (Attributes Set) Additional permissions granted to this member beyond the group. Note: the API does not return permissions in a readable form, so this value is managed write-only from configuration and is not refreshed during Read; out-of-band changes to permissions are not detected as drift. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--permissions))
- `user_id` (String) Account ID of the user to add. Mutually exclusive with `email`; exactly one must be set. Changing it forces a new membership.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) When the membership was created (RFC 3339).
- `id` (String) Unique identifier of the membership.
- `member_id` (String) Account ID of the member. This is the canonical identifier used for import.
- `organization_id` (String) ID of the organization this membership belongs to.
- `updated_at` (String) When the membership was last updated (RFC 3339).

<a id="nestedatt--permissions"></a>
### Nested Schema for `permissions`

Required:

- `id` (String) The permission identifier.
- `resources` (Set of String) Resource identifiers this permission is scoped to.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# IAM members are imported by their account (member) ID.
terraform import wellplayed_iam_member.by_id acc_01h...
```
